name: kibo-contribution-graph
title: Contribution Graph
author: Kibo UI
description: Displays activity counts in a contribution calendar.

changes: Removed the unused weekdays label field, constrained default levels to the four styled intensities, gave contribution cells default image roles and labels, and changed legend margins to logical utilities.

modifications.change: Removed a no-op label field, constrained default intensity levels, added default accessible cell semantics, and changed legend margins to logical utilities.
modifications.reason: Keep the public API truthful, prevent unstyled levels, expose daily values to assistive technology, and preserve the legend in right-to-left layouts.
